headline: LUNR Stock Rises 124% in 3 Months: Is There More Upside Ahead?
summary: Intuitive Machines surges 124% over three months as NASA-linked lunar contracts, defense deals, and acquisitions fuel its shift into space infrastructure.

headline: Palantir Insiders Are Selling 9 Shares for Every 1 They Buy. Here Is the Defense Stock Smart Money Is Buying Instead
summary: Palantir (NASDAQ:PLTR) is the stock everyone wants to talk about after a 70% revenue surge in Q4 2025 and CEO Alex Karp’s now-famous “We are an n of 1” declaration. But here’s what’s worth watching underneath the headlines. Palantir Is Priced For A Future That Cannot Disappoint The numbers underneath the hype look ugly for ... headline: Advocating for barbell between U.S. and EM, says strategist
summary: For the first time since 2007, the U.S. has sold 30-year bonds at a 5-percent yield. J.P. Morgan's Madison Faller explains how political uncertainty, and its influence on fiscal policy, is being priced in to the longer end of the yield curve.
